name: Video & Audio
description: Index video and audio files with transcription and frame analysis.
longDescription: Process long video and audio files for your knowledge base. Splits oversized Whisper uploads, captures scene-change-aware frames in a bounded pass, and supports local files, bounded direct URL downloads, and YouTube videos/playlists. Requires ffmpeg; yt-dlp is only required for YouTube URLs.
author: Larkup

configSchema.label: Frame extraction interval (seconds)
configSchema.help: Fallback interval used when scene-change detection finds no frames.

configSchema.label: Audio Provider
configSchema.help: Choose the provider that should transcribe both audio files and video audio tracks.

configSchema.label: Audio API Key
configSchema.help: Required for the selected provider. This key is used only by the Video & Audio tool.
